rules.motif: a forced smile reflected as a split neon expression
tears turning into tiny cyber-pink light particles
memory fragments suspended like broken glass
midnight reflections and lonely window light
a pulsing heart-shaped reflection hidden in the environment
a nameless signboard glowing and fading without readable text
wind-driven light trails crossing the character's silhouette
empty urban paths with reflections stretching forward
handwritten words dissolving into neon fragments
split mirror showing two versions of the same face
cyber-pink rain trails merging with tears on glass
a single light source pulling the character forward through darkness
a solitary figure surrounded by empty neon space
two converging neon silhouettes that never fully meet
fast-motion light streak chasing the protagonist
a frozen clock reflection in wet pavement
dissolving dreamscape edges around the character
ember sparks rising into the neon-lit darkness
distant star reflections pulled down into the puddles
a doorway silhouette lit by cyber-pink from the other side
an unanswered glowing screen in an empty hand
the protagonist's shadow stretched larger and brighter than the figure
sound waves made visible as drifting neon light rings
light fragmenting across the floor like shattered glass
a long empty road whose vanishing point glows cyber pink
neon-edged petals dissolving at the frame edges
